heroHeadline: Fukushima Daiichi: 15 Years of Recovery, Decommissioning, and Ongoing Challenges
heroSubtitle: TEPCO's 30–40 year decommissioning roadmap continues. ALPS-treated water ocean release ongoing since August 2023. Fuel debris retrieval at Units 1–3 in earliest stages. ~28,000 evacuees still displaced.
footerNote: Data sourced from TEPCO, Japan NRA, IAEA, NHK, Fukushima Prefecture, UNSCEAR, and peer-reviewed health studies. Last comprehensive backfill: March 2026.
